name: Bayside Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Bayside Pickleball Club in Santa Rosa Beach, FL! There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, food, restrooms, water, and youth programming.
open_play_schedule: Please register early because we max it at 24 people per day.

name: Boys And Girls Club of the Emerald Coast
description: Venue closed up after 12/18/25  final session and the new winter session will start 1/13/2026.
fees:
Members only — Registration fee is $35 and drop in fee five dollars
Or pay $200 for the whole session from January 13 through April 29, 2026

name: Coastal Elite Sports
description: At Coastal Elite Sports, we pride ourselves on offering Northwest Florida’s finest indoor pickleball facility. Our two regulation-sized pickleball courts feature tournament-quality, professional-grade playing surfaces that ensure a premium experience for both casual players and serious competitors. Located in the heart of Freeport, FL, our facility is perfect for players of all ages and skill levels.

name: Driftwood Estates Park
description: This Walton County park is open dawn til dusk and there is free parking. There is also a wall you can hit against. This park is in a residential neighborhood a bit off the beaten path up by the Bay on the north side of 98 closer to Sandestin/Miramar. There are also 2 tennis courts, a basketball court and a walking trail.

name: Dunes Family Putting Course
description: Dunes Family Putting Course is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Miramar Beach, FL. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Hammock Bay North
description: Hammock Bay North is a place to play pickleball in Freeport, FL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Hidden Dunes Pickleball Courts
description: Hidden Dunes Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Miramar Beach, FL. There are 5 outdoor clay, hard, and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, food, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. The courts are private. You can reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Seasonal hours may apply. Open daily except for  Sunday.
fees: Private — Players staying off property $8 / Players staying on property $6 / Homeowners $4 Discounted pickleball packages available: Off property 8 plays for $50 / On property 8 plays for $40

name: Hilton Sandestin Beach Golf Resort & Spa
description: The address given is for the hotel on the gulf. The hotel does not have pickle ball courts and referred me to the tennis center. The tennis center does not offer open play at this time. They offer clinics, tournaments, and pickle ball court rentals.

name: Legion Park (near Destin)
description: Come play pickleball at Legion Park (near Destin) in Miramar Beach, FL! There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Pickleball at Seascape
description: Pickleball at Seascape is a place to play pickleball in Miramar Beach, FL. There are 6 outdoor clay courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and water. The courts are private. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Sandestin Golf and Beach Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Sandestin Golf and Beach Resort in Miramar Beach, FL! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, adaptive programming, and food. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Reservations can be made 24hrs in advance for the public by calling the pro shop.

name: Sandestin Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Sandestin Tennis Center in Miramar Beach, FL! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, restrooms, and water. The courts can be reserved. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Call pro shop. $5/person per hour.  Wednesday session: $10 per person

name: South Walton Sports Complex
description: South Walton Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in Santa Rosa Beach, FL. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved.

name: WaterColor Tennis/Pickleball
description: WaterColor Tennis/Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Santa Rosa Beach, FL. There are 2 outdoor clay and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, and water.
